---
title: "Redirecting..."
output: 
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
---

<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url=https://whartonsabi.github.io/moneyball/home">
<script>window.location.replace("https://whartonsabi.github.io/moneyball/home");</script>

Redirecting to [Moneyball Academy](https://whartonsabi.github.io/moneyball/home)...
